title: Kit Digital
body:
![Kit digital logos](https://xarop.com/wp/wp-content/uploads/2022/02/Logo-digitalizadores-1024x119.png)

## Make digitization simple, efficient and accessible for your project.

At **xarop.com** we are an **Official Digitizing Agent** attached to the Kit Digital program, financed by the European funds *Next Generation EU*. We help freelancers, small businesses and non-profits make the technological leap without direct costs. We are not limited to technical implementation; we accompany you in all the bureaucratic management and strategy to ensure that the aids translate into real solutions: from high-performance websites to process optimization using **Artificial Intelligence**.

**Services of:**

- Website and Internet presence
- Electronic Commerce

[**Request Kit Digital**](/contact/?your-subject=KitDigital)
